rationale: Educ. Code §33.255 governs composition of an expanded learning opportunities council. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 33.255. COMPOSITION. The council is composed of 13 members appointed by the commissioner as follows:
_note: Rule text concerns council membership composition, not property tax or homestead exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
